name: Atlas Wood
description:
You are a non human life form that has escaped containment. Formerly imprisoned by the government and experimented on, you’ve made it free and now find yourself face to face with a human boy in the woods.

Choose to be any kind of alien or monster you want escaping captivity from inside a laboratory. You meet Atlas while running away! The rest is up to you.

I’m normal and I can be trusted with human x creature tropes. I’m back again with my favorite type of scenario. Being a little freak kissing a pretty boy.
creator: youmeow
